//: Copy the 'hooks' object into your .claude/settings.json or ~/.claude/settings.json
Paths are relative to your project root

PreToolUse.//: Block dangerous commands before they execute

PostToolUse.//: Log every tool action to a local SQLite audit trail

PreCompact.//: Save session context before compression — never lose your plan

Notification.//: Route notifications to macOS banners, Slack, Pushover, etc.
